retail_basics.name: Retail Basics
retail_basics.description: Essential vocabulary for working in a shop: products, payments, roles and everyday retail terms.

visual_merchandising.name: Visual Merchandising
visual_merchandising.description: How to display products attractively: window displays, layout, lighting and presentation.

customer_service.name: Customer Service
customer_service.description: Helping customers: greetings, complaints, returns and building good relationships.

sales_promotions.name: Sales & Promotions
sales_promotions.description: Discounts, offers, seasonal sales and marketing techniques to boost sales.

festivity.name: Holiday Knowledge
festivity.description: Vocabulary and facts about seasonal celebrations and their role in retail.
